commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair is indicated; the remaining action is maintainer selection and landing for a protected Discord message-delivery fix with competing open fallback PRs.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern found; the diff does not touch workflows, lockfiles, dependency sources, install scripts, permissions, or secret handling. (sha=95fad34ed96d579f78799b16fdcd75fd1b90b4ac)
commands.review_summary:
The PR reserves Discord voice helper names from CLI lazy outbound sender synthesis, preserves explicit helper aliases, and adds focused CLI mapping regression tests.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +31, Docs +1. Total +42 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the CLI deps proxy synthesizes a lazy sender for missing discordVoice, and Discord reads deps.discordVoice before falling back to its runtime voice helper; I did not run a fresh failing Discord cron job locally.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair is indicated; the remaining action is maintainer selection and landing for a protected Discord message-delivery fix with competing open fallback PRs.

target.title: fix(cli): preserve Discord voice outbound helper
target.body:
Summary
- Keep CLI lazy outbound dependency routing from treating Discord voice helper keys as normal channel adapters.
- Preserve explicitly supplied `discordVoice` / `sendDiscordVoice` helpers while leaving missing helpers unresolved so the Discord runtime can decide the voice path.
- Add focused regression coverage for the CLI deps proxy and outbound send mapping, plus a changelog fix entry for #84952.

Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/deps.test.ts src/cli/outbound-send-mapping.test.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.double-announce.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files, 106 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/cli/deps.ts src/cli/deps.test.ts src/cli/outbound-send-mapping.ts src/cli/outbound-send-mapping.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/cli/deps.ts src/cli/deps.test.ts src/cli/outbound-send-mapping.ts src/cli/outbound-send-mapping.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

Behavior addressed: Discord cron announces with `messages.tts.auto="always"` could fail before the Discord voice-message helper ran because the CLI outbound deps proxy manufactured a fake channel adapter for the `discordVoice` helper lookup.

Real environment tested: WSL2 Ubuntu source checkout on Node 22 with focused CLI, Discord outbound adapter, and cron double-announce regression tests. Crabbox/live Discord delivery was not run for this source-level fix.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/deps.test.ts src/cli/outbound-send-mapping.test.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.double-announce.test.ts --reporter=dot`

Evidence after fix: The new CLI deps regression asserts `createDefaultDeps().discordVoice` and `createDefaultDeps().sendDiscordVoice` remain `undefined` instead of becoming unavailable channel adapters, and the outbound mapping regression asserts lazy channel factories are not called for those helper keys while explicit helpers are still preserved.

Observed result after fix: Focused regression suite passed: 4 files, 106 tests passed. Formatting, lint, diff check, and the branch was rebased onto current `main` with an SSH-signed head commit.

What was not tested: A live Discord cron announce with generated TTS audio was not run before opening this PR; the proof is focused source-level regression coverage for the broken dependency lookup path.

Fixes #84952
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
